title: Bielsko-Biała、Silesian — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Bielsko-Biała、Silesianの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Bielsko-BiałaはSilesianにある人口170,663の都市です。A picturesque city nestled at the foot of the Beskid Mountains, known for its textile industry heritage, charming old town, and outdoor recreation.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
